_comment_tool_json: name: Internal identifier. Must match the directory name.
displayName: How the agent JSON references this tool. Must match 'name'
exactly (use snake_case). Mismatched names cause 'Reference not found' on push.
pythonFunction.name: The Python function name in the code file.
pythonFunction.pythonCode: Path to the Python file, relative to the app directory.
pythonFunction.description: Tool description for the LLM -- it uses this to decide
WHEN to call the tool. Treat this as a core instruction.
executionType: SYNCHRONOUS (wait for result) or ASYNCHRONOUS (fire and forget).
Use SYNCHRONOUS for tools whose return value the agent needs to respond.
name: lookup_account

pythonFunction.name: lookup_account
pythonFunction.description: Looks up customer account details by account ID. Returns account information including balance, plan, and service status. Requires authenticated session.
